final:
module counter_4bit(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            q <= q + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
